functions.name: google_meet.get_all_available_slots
functions.description: Retrieve all available meeting time slots across multiple attendees using Google Calendar FreeBusy API.

args.days_to_check: optional integer (default: 5, number of days to scan)

returns.slots: list of dicts with { start, end, date }

functions.name: google_meet.create_meeting
functions.description: Create a Google Calendar meeting event with a Meet link for given attendees. as it takes the first available slot based on details this is preferred

returns.return_str: a meessage type retrun so that it can be used on chatbot or email body

functions.name: google_meet.get_attendees_or_contacts
functions.description: Retrieve a cleaned, validated list of attendees or fallback contacts. Supports both testing and normal modes, validates replyable emails, and handles the 'all' keyword to include all contacts. (it is recommended for retrieving meeting or gmail based functions for contacts or emails)

args.attendees: string or list — attendee email(s) or 'all' keyword

returns.attendees: list of valid attendee email addresses

notes: In testing mode, uses TEST_EMAIL and TEST_EMAIL2 environment variables as fallback.
If 'all' is passed, returns all replyable contact emails.
Falls back to empty list if no valid attendees found.

functions.name: google_meet.schedule_meeting_on_first_available
functions.description: Find the first available slot across attendees and schedule a Google Meet automatically by assigning current date and time if they dont mentioned, as per emails we take user emails or use all contacts or emails.

returns.meeting: dict with { event_id, summary, meet_link, start_time, end_time, attendees } or error reason

functions.name: google_meet.update_meeting
functions.description: Update an existing Google Calendar event (change title, attendees, or timings).

functions.name: google_meet.delete_meeting
functions.description: Delete a Google Calendar meeting by its event ID.

functions.name: google_meet.is_meeting_slot_available
functions.description: Check if at least one available slot exists across all attendees for a given time window.

functions.name: google_meet.get_event_by_meet_link
functions.description: Find a Google Calendar event based on its Meet link.

functions.name: google_meet.get_first_available_slot
functions.description: Get the first available meeting slot across attendees for given date and time window.
